specific_location: Plaster Reservoir. NE of 136th Ave and Lowell St.
description: Large bird, larger than the nearby Canada Geese. Very white, long neck. Black bill with a small spot of yellow in front of the eyes. Top of the bill curved down from eye to eye, did not look like "V".Behaviors: Bird just gently swam around the reservoir with its head up. Did not see it try to feed.Call: Did not make any sound.Plumage: adult
